Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5013 0 0}Oh, hello, you two! Have you been playing together?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4104 0 0}It sounds like you want to tell us something, Koromaru. Is something the matter?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 52 -1 0 0}Oh, that reminds me of that food we found. It looked like it would be really yummy for Koro-chan.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 6 52 -1 0 0}Oh, is that what you really wanted this whole time?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 52 -1 0 0}Hold on, now. It's not time to eat yet. It's important that we adhere to our schedules.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_013_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 3 52 -1 0 0}Well... You can hold out, right? Because you're a good, strong boy![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_018_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 6 52 -1 0 0}Well... I suppose we can make an exception.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 6 52 -1 0 0}After all, these extraordinary circumstances we've found ourselves in must be taking their toll on Koromaru as well.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_020_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 52 -1 0 0}I guess this all ended up going just as Koro-chan wanted.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_021_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 52 -1 0 0}He's certainly masterful at getting others to bend to his will, even without the ability to speak.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_023_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 6 52 -1 0 0}Eating too much isn't good, though... We'll have to be extra careful about his calorie and fat intake after this.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 6 52 -1 0 0}Maybe we should add more vegetables to his diet.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_025_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4132 0 0}Now, now, Koromaru. It's unbecoming to be a picky eater.[n]{f 1 1}
